labels.name: email_find_by_name
labels.description: Search for people/contacts matching criteria and find their professional email address from name and company domain. Alternative to Apollo people-search at 4x lower cost. Returns the most likely email with confidence score after testing 15+ patterns against MX records. POST variant of email_find_by_

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Private data: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Public sink: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Destructive: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Private data: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Public sink: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name · Destructive: email_find_by_name, email_find_by_name

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "email_find_by_name" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash 828e450a)" → after: "Search for people/contacts matching criteria and find their professional email address from name and company domain. Alternative to Apollo people-search at 4x lower cost. Returns the most likely email with confidence score after testing 15+ patterns against MX records. POST variant of email_find_by_"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
